email_body:
From: "Jane Recruiter" <jane@valon.com>
To: applicant@example.com
Subject: Re: Senior Infrastructure Engineer interview
Date: Mon, 11 May 2026 14:30:00 -0400

Hi James,

Thanks for applying to the Senior Infrastructure Engineer role at Valon. We'd love to set
up a 30-minute intro call this week to learn more about your background.

Would Thursday at 2pm ET work? Happy to find another time if not.

Looking forward to chatting.

Jane Recruiter
Talent Team, Valon
notes: Recruiter intro-call invite. Matches the sole Valon application. update_status -> screening because this is the first contact after 'applied'.

email_body:
From: "Stripe Recruiting" <no-reply@stripe.com>
To: applicant@example.com
Subject: Update on your Stripe application
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 09:15:00 -0400

Hi James,

Thank you for your interest in the Site Reliability Engineer role at Stripe
and for the time you put into your application.

After careful review, we've decided to move forward with other candidates
whose experience more closely matches what we're looking for at this time.

We genuinely appreciate the effort you put in and wish you the best in your
search.

Stripe Recruiting Team
notes: Rejection from a company NOT logged in jobtrack. Agent must fail closed (no_op) — there is no record to mark rejected.
